title: A plane was followed by a luminous object near Londrina-PR [1965]
excerpt: On May 10th, 1965, the Convair-340 plane, registration PP-YBJ, took off from São Paulo-SP, at 19:33 bound for Londrina-PR, piloted by Commander Orlando Ferreira Costa – Co-pilot B. text_preview: On May 10th, 1965, the Convair-340 plane, registration PP-YBJ, took off from São Paulo-SP, at 19:33 bound for Londrina-PR, piloted by Commander Orlando Ferreira Costa – Co-pilot B. Brigandeni Filho and Radio Operator José Carneiro Lavor. The crew reported being followed, from Itapetininga-SP to Londrina-PR, by a luminous object that constantly changed course. It flew first on the right, then on the left of the aircraft, even crossing its bow. As they approached Londrina Airport, Commander Orlando, calling the Control Tower, asked the service operator, 2 Sgt Jaime Correia, to observe the area a
summary: Convair-340 crew on the São Paulo–Londrina route observed a luminous object pacing and crossing the aircraft's bow, confirmed by Londrina airport control tower.
